title: CRISPR Therapeutics Provides Business Update and Reports Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Q3 2025 Business Update. Key Financial Results: R&D Expenses of $58.9 million, down 28% from $82.2 million in Q3 2024. G&A Expenses of $16.9 million, down 3% from $17.4 million in Q3 2024. Net Loss of $106.4 million, up 24% from $85.9 million in Q3 2024. Cash Position of $1,944.1 million in cash, equivalents, and marketable securities, up $40.3 million from December 31, 2024. CASGEVY Commercialization: Approximately 165 patients completed initial cell collection; 39 received infusions. Nearly 300 patients referred to Authorized Treatment Centers. Company expects clear line of sight to over $100 million in total CASGEVY revenue this year. Reimbursement agreement reached in Italy. Clinical Pipeline Progress: Pediatric Phase 3 studies for exa-cel enrollment completed; dosing expected to finish Q4 2025. CTX310 Phase 1 data presented at American Heart Association conference and published in The New England Journal of Medicine. SRSD107 Phase 2 trial expanded with first European patient dosed. CTX460 preclinical data unveiled, with clinical trial initiation planned for mid-2026.
